title: FilterInput
description: Advanced filter input for GraphQL inbox queries. Allows filtering on email fields beyond namespace and tag, with wildcard and regex support.

field.description: Email field to apply the filter to.

match.description: Matching strategy. 'exact' requires full string match; 'wildcard' supports * and ? patterns; 'regex' accepts regular expressions.

action.description: Whether to include or exclude emails matching this filter.

value.description: Value to match against the specified field. Body fields (text/html) are limited to 30KB.
